tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix tar member normalization in audit tool + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `_normalize_member_name`, update `_read_json_member` + `_count_dataset_files`. Replace `_build_tar` helper with realistic `shutil.make_archive` version. Add `TestPathNormalization` (5 tests).

**Files:** `tools/gcs_archive_audit.py`, `tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py`

**Verify:** `cd c:/Users/randr/Documents/Workspaces/RAG-HP-PUB && pytest tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/gcs_archive_audit.py", "tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd c:/Users/randr/Documents/Workspaces/RAG-HP-PUB && pytest tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["normalize helper", "lookups normalize", "realistic fixture", "5 regression tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add --restore-from-quarantine flag and function
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `restore_from_quarantine` function + `--restore-from-quarantine PREFIX` argparse flag + early-exit branch. 3 unit tests.

**Files:** `tools/gcs_archive_audit.py`, `tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py`

**Verify:** `cd c:/Users/randr/Documents/Workspaces/RAG-HP-PUB && pytest tools/tests/test_gcs_archive_audit.py::TestRestoreFromQuarantine -v`
